channel.title: Bebo on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Bebo on smpaget blog

item.title: bebo
item.description: Am I the only one getting random messages from hot young ladies who are bored and about to turn on their webcam? I ask this as I currently keep four bebo’s for me and work stuff, yet my own is the only one which gets these types of messages. It’s a mystery!

item.title: I am the King of the Internet (Beta version)
item.description: But i think i have it. I am posting this blog and it it works this will appear on my facebook and bebo account within three hours. If so I will be the king of the internet, and need to set up a myspace and twitter to check it does work there to. But I am hopeful. as soon as it works I will tell you how. in the mean time just bask in the goodness that may be how cool i am

item.title: Kilberry Trip 2007
item.description: (Photo from the Port Ban Camp Website) I have started a Bebo site for BCM, Port Ban, Kilberry Camp. which I led this weekend. It was fun despite the gale force winds and driving rain. It was good to be at the beach, to sit round fires, and get to spend time with new and familiar people. it grows the soul. grows life. allows some fragment of heaven to break through the grime and slime and stuff we put in the way of it. The details of what we did and supporting websites and thoughts will be put up there in the blog for all the young people and leaders who were at the weekend. thanks to all who were there and helped at the weekend.

item.title: new stuff
item.description:
I have become a new memeber.

BEBO Skype - scott@schelp yip i am offically new. feel free to ebcome my friend thanks
